tavernkeeper_01.text: Gorkash the troll fears silver. Durgan can forge a silver blade — bring him a troll tooth and that stolen jewelry the bandits fence.
My Esra keeps the Riverside Inn. Mention my name and she'll treat you well — we've been wed twenty years.

blacksmith_01.text: The deep shafts past Stonepine hold mithril, but you'd need Mining skill worth 35 winters to pry it loose.
A hooded traveler once paid me triple to forge a silver blade — never returned for it. Ask me about it when Gorkash is dead.

minstrel_01.text: There's a ruined keep in the north-east wilds. My grandmother's songs say its cellars were never looted.

guard_01.text: The bandits on the east road answer to someone inside a settlement. Watch who sells stolen jewelry.

hamlet_priest_01.text: The forest hollow south of the chapel grows herbs thicker than anywhere — the old druid blessed it.

camp_foreman_01.text: We sealed the east shaft after two miners vanished. If you're set on going down, carry a weapon and a potion.
